name: Orange-Chocolate Chippers
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, cream cheese, and sugars.
2. Add eggs, orange peel, and vanilla; beat well.
3. Stir together flour, baking powder, and salt; add to the creamed mixture.
4. Mix in chocolate chips.
5. Drop teaspoonfuls 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
6. If desired, sprinkle lightly with nuts or granulated sugar.
7. Bake at 350°F for about 10 minutes. Makes 6 dozen cookies.
